title: Community Shelters * Mothers - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Housing & Shelter > Community Shelters * Mothers 2 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - No Filter Ex-Offenders Homeless Couples Homeless Families Homeless Men Homeless Veterans Homeless Women Homeless Youth Mothers Pregnant Individuals Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF ALBANY HELPING HANDS EMERGENCY SHELTER AND TRANSITIONAL HOUSING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides shelter and transitional housing for men and women, as well as a transitional home for mothers with children. 619 SE 9th Avenue Albany, OR 97322 Eligibility: Age 18 and older and adult mothers with minor children. Service animals only. Hours: Shelter services: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Check-in: 7 days per week 9am-5pm Email (541) 926-4036 Get Directions Visit Website More Details EUGENE MISSION RESCUE SHELTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides emergency shelter for up to 14 days. Clients will have access to meals, clothing, laundry facilities, and showers. Guests wishing to utilize the services beyond 14 days may apply for additional services. 1542 W 1st Avenue Eugene, OR 97402 Eligibility: Adults age 18 and older and mothers with children. Individuals must not have been convicted of arson. Hours: Intake: 7 days per week 8am-4pm Email (541) 344-3251 Get Directions Visit Website More Details ALBANY HELPING HANDS EMERGENCY SHELTER AND TRANSITIONAL HOUSING EUGENE MISSION RESCUE SHELTER
